name: WF-Welcome

parameters.subject: =Welcome to Bendigo Fight Centre, {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.name }}!
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.name }},

Welcome to BFC! We're pumped to have you.

Your membership is now active. Here's what to do next:

👉 Book your first class: https://bfc-echo.vercel.app/portal
📅 View the timetable: https://bfc-echo.vercel.app/timetable

We have BJJ, boxing, Muay Thai, wrestling and MMA — something for every level.

If you have any questions, just reply to this email or give us a call.

See you on the mats,
Kaleb
Bendigo Fight Centre
https://bendigofightcentre.com.au

parameters.subject: =How's your first few days going, {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.name }}?
parameters.message:
=Hey {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.name }},

Just checking in — have you had a chance to come in yet?

If you haven't booked your first class, you can do it here:
https://bfc-echo.vercel.app/portal

Our coaches are super welcoming to new members so don't be shy — everyone starts somewhere!

Let me know if you need anything.

Kaleb
Bendigo Fight Centre

parameters.subject: =Your BFC timetable this week
parameters.message:
=Hey {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.name }},

Here's what's on this week — pick a session and come train!

📋 Full timetable: https://bfc-echo.vercel.app/timetable

We've got BJJ, boxing, Muay Thai, wrestling and MMA — something for every level.

See you soon,
Kaleb
Bendigo Fight Centre

parameters.subject: =You're part of the BFC family now
parameters.message:
=Hey {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.name }},

You've been training with us for two weeks — legend!

Don't forget you can manage your membership, check your booking history, and update your details at:
https://bfc-echo.vercel.app/portal

Keep showing up — consistency is everything in martial arts.

Kaleb
Bendigo Fight Centre

parameters.subject: =Quick favour — leave us a Google review?
parameters.message:
=Hey {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.name }},

You've been with us a month now — time flies!

If you've been enjoying training, we'd really appreciate a Google review. It only takes 2 minutes and makes a huge difference for a small gym like ours.

⭐ Leave a review: https://g.page/r/[YOUR_GOOGLE_REVIEW_LINK]/review

Thanks legend,
Kaleb
Bendigo Fight Centre

notes:
SETUP:
1. Connect your Gmail account in Credentials
2. Set N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET environment variable in n8n (Settings → Variables)
3. Copy this workflow's webhook URL and paste into N8N_WELCOME_WEBHOOK_URL in Vercel
4. Replace [YOUR_GOOGLE_REVIEW_LINK] in the Day 30 email with your actual Google review URL
5. Activate the workflow

Payload received: { member_id, name, email, plan }

This workflow sends a 5-email welcome sequence over 30 days:
- Day 0: Welcome + portal link
- Day 2: Check-in + booking prompt
- Day 7: Timetable reminder
- Day 14: BFC family message
- Day 30: Google review request
